manual_entries.title: AUX E01 Water Flow Switch Protection
manual_entries.summary: Water flow switch protection stops module compressors and may lock after repeated occurrences.

recommended_actions: Check linked pump status and wiring

doc.file_name: AUX Central AC Fault Codes (Modular and VRF).pdf

chunk.cleaned_text: Water flow switch protection; protection switch open; stop compressors; repeated occurrences lock the fault.

evidence.evidence_text: 水流量开关保护 保护开关断开 E01

manual_entries.title: AUX E22 High Pressure Switch Protection
manual_entries.summary: High pressure switch protection stops the affected module compressor and locks after repeated occurrences.

recommended_actions: Check condenser airflow and refrigerant side restrictions

doc.file_name: AUX Central AC Fault Codes (Modular and VRF).pdf

chunk.cleaned_text: High pressure switch protection; protection switch open; stop the affected compressor; repeated occurrences lock the fault.

evidence.evidence_text: 高压压力开关保护 保护开关断开 E22

manual_entries.title: AUX E23 Low Pressure Switch Protection
manual_entries.summary: Low pressure switch protection stops the affected module compressor and locks after repeated occurrences.

recommended_actions: Check refrigerant charge and expansion valve condition

manual_entries.title: Guoxiang 49 1#/3# Compressor High Pressure
manual_entries.summary: Fault code 49 indicates high pressure for compressor group 1#/3# on the modular unit.

recommended_actions: Investigate high-pressure causes listed in the manual
Clear the high-pressure trip cause before restart

manual_entries.title: Guoxiang 50 1#/3# Compressor Overload
manual_entries.summary: Fault code 50 indicates overload for compressor group 1#/3# on the modular unit.

recommended_actions: Check supply voltage and phase balance
Inspect compressor electrical protection and pressure conditions
